name: New Zealand Brown Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in water according to package directions. Drain and cool.
2. Peel Kiwifruits and cut into 1/4-inch slices. Cut the slices in half to form semicircles.
3. Core and dice Granny Smith apples into 1/4-inch cubes.
4. Toss together rice, Kiwifruit, apple, celery, red pepper strips, walnuts, green onions, and parsley in a salad bowl.
5. Mix together vinegar and olive oil in a small bowl.
6. Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss to mix well.
7. Cover and refrigerate 1-2 hours to allow flavors to blend before serving. Makes 6 servings.
